summary: Implemented full auth spike for replacing x-api-key with Cognito JWT auth. Deliverables: Cognito provisioning script, scientist CLI (Device Flow), Lambda Authorizer (JWKS-cached JWT validation + legacy x-api-key fallback), Flask before_request middleware (scope enforcement, no-op in offline/test), end-to-end validation script (local + remote modes). Wired into api.py and serverless.yml. Committed to spike/286-modern-auth.
user_notes: spike components ready to test (30m planning/tuning + 5m for deliverables. Impressive.

summary: Captured project strategy documents: Node/Apollo vs Python/Graphene migration analysis, dynamic Pydantic-driven schema pros/cons, and a comprehensive codebase cleanup/healthcare plan covering tests, architecture, data migration tooling, and MkDocs docs.
user_notes: captured a few more project strategy docs.

summary: Deployed JWT auth spike to AWS (spike-toshi-api-dev-v2). Removed Elasticsearch entirely. Wired jwtAuthorizer Lambda into API Gateway events. Fixed: .env packaged in Lambda (bypassing middleware), wrong COGNITO_USER_POOL_ID (broken JWKS URL), authorizer context read from serverless.authorizer environ not HTTP headers, logging_aws.yaml root logger misconfiguration, USER_PASSWORD_AUTH tokens lack custom scopes (mapped from cognito:groups instead). Full auth flow confirmed end-to-end for both M2M and scientist/SSH flows. Demoed to team.
user_notes: completed and demoed spike to team.

summary: Auth spike wrap-up: switched authorizer identitySource to context.requestId so legacy x-api-key clients always reach the Lambda. Fixed TOKEN→REQUEST type. All 9/9 e2e tests pass. Also wrote session reflection on LLM/human collaboration — corrected initial framing: LLM failed to validate implementation against stated backward-compat requirement (solution-space anchoring), not a case of missing hidden knowledge.
user_notes: final testing and resolved missing requirement. Gotta keep on our toes folks.

summary: Planning session: designed SSO/IDP integration architecture for nshm-toshi-api. Reviewed existing Cognito auth spike. Defined personas (runzi-local, runzi-batch, runzi-admin, M2M). Settled on Cognito + Cognito Identity Pool + Entra OIDC federation as recommended approach. Wrote IDP_INTEGRATION_PLAN.md and IDP_INTEGRATION_OPTIONS_STUDY.md covering options analysis (IAM Identity Center vs Entra Direct vs Cognito), pros/cons, migration path, and admin boundary clarifications.

Refined IDP integration plan: explored nzshm-runzi for actual IAM requirements (S3, Secrets Manager, ECR CreateRepository, multi-region), updated persona/role policy table accordingly. Clarified IT team admin boundaries re IAM Identity Center vs Cognito. Established iam_roles.py as single source of truth for runzi user permissions across both repos. Committed both planning docs.
user_notes: update docs, decks cleared for takeoff

summary: Implemented Phase 1 SSO authentication: IAM roles (runzi-local/batch/admin), Cognito Identity Pool with role mappings, aws-creds CLI command. Renamed spike/ to auth_migration/. Added v0.6.0 changelog entry.
user_notes: Phase 1 complete - ready to test deployment with aws sso login

summary: Separated test users into test_users.json and automation_client_secret into local .env. Refactored cognito_setup.py to write public config to auth_config.json (committed) rather than exposing credentials in git. Updated e2e and auth scripts to pull from these separated config files. Secured repo and updated changelog/documentation.
user_notes: tidy up security and config settings

summary: Tidied up the package layout. Promoted the auth_migration module to a top-level auth directory, updated imports in api.py, corrected the logging configuration in logging_aws.yaml, and updated the schema about query to remove the SPIKE tag. Reflected changes in CHANGELOG.md and updated all documentation.

GH#290 — provisioned AWS Secrets Manager container (ToshiM2MSecret, DeletionPolicy:Retain) + secretsmanager:GetSecretValue grants on three Runzi IAM roles + Outputs in serverless.yml. Added auth/create_m2m_secret.py (mints Cognito M2M app client, writes {client_id, client_secret} to SM, with Cognito-client rollback on SM failure) and auth/rotate_m2m_secret.py (safe new→put→sleep→delete swap with optional authorizer COGNITO_CLIENT_ID allowlist patching). README M2M bootstrap + manual rotation runbook; Option C cons bullet in IDP_INTEGRATION_OPTIONS_STUDY. Diagnosed and fixed pre-existing Lambda bundle-size breach (375 MiB → 33.5 MiB unzipped) by adding .venv/, spike/, .yarn/, .serverless/, .ruff_cache/, graphql_api/tests/, auth/tests/ to serverless.yml package.exclude; also fixed package-log.json→package-lock.json typo. Smoketested SM→ToshiTokenManager→Cognito client_credentials token mint end-to-end against nshm-admin dev (token claims verified: correct iss, client_id, token_use=access, scope toshi/read+write). Released as 0.7.0 (CHANGELOG, pyproject.toml, graphql_api/__init__.py, .bumpversion.cfg, package.json, uv.lock). PR #291 opened against deploy-test, 9 commits.
